printed.name: Hip Circles Prep
printed.setup: Sitting in V position, arms straight and parallel, hands placed on Mat behind pelvis, fingers facing away from body, legs straight and together on diagonal line, feet plantarflexed

movement.exhale: Circle legs down and around to opposite side, return to start position

cues: Move pelvis and legs as one unit
Maintain pelvic lumbar stabilization (bend knees if necessary)
